  "claims": [
    "People in the United States are 25 times more likely to be killed in a gun homicide than those living in other developed countries.",
    "California has had more than 12,000 gun homicides since 2014.",
    "Individuals deemed mentally incompetent in misdemeanor cases do not have their mental incompetency reported to the Department of Justice.",
